case_title: THOMAS A. DAVIES VS. LARRY SILVER

RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED ON 11/08/12 TO DEFENDANT LARRY SILVER, "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIES, THOMAS A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVER, LARRY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $680.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
